case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9,000.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9,000.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT IMANI BRUCE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR RESPECTIVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES HEREIN. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM AND NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF IMANI BRUCE; POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION; DECLARATION OF RAYMOND FONG; DECLARATION OF TRACY SACCA [PROPOSED ORDER] (TRANSACTION ID # 58903866) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF IMANI BRUCE IS DENIED. LIBERALLY CONSTRUED, MS. BRUCE SATISFIED THE REQUIREMENT THAT SHE STATE THE INTEREST SHE HAD IN THE CURRENCY THAT WAS SEIZED. THAT INTEREST BEING HER EARNINGS FROM EMPLOYMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/HK
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAYMOND FONG, TEL. NO. 1-415-551-9583 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF IMANI BRUCE is Denied. Liberally construed, Ms. Bruce satisfied the requirement that she state the interest she had in the currency that was seized. That interest being her earnings from employment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
